About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's rankings with a score of 94.7 (rank #1), demonstrating extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—10-year returns of 1,523.92% dwarf its 1-year return of 160.28%, indicating sustained multi-decade growth. The stock passes all four ratio efficiency tests and trades above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200), with a "clean" momentum signal and "strong_buy" flag despite elevated volatility (vol_ratio 1.388). LINC significantly outperforms SPY by 137.45% over 1-year and 1,302.54% over 10-years, correlating most strongly with materials (XLB at 0.364) while showing minimal correlation to commodities and gold. MPC ranks second with a 90.85% 1-year return and solid 5-year performance (357.87%), but shows a weaker relative advantage versus SPY (68.03% over 1-year) and carries a notably higher "bad_spy_score" of 0.4343, suggesting its outperformance is less consistent or reliable than LINC's. The data reveals LINC as an exceptional outlier in sustained momentum performance across multiple decades with clean technical confirmation
